reason_for_decision: The article gives beginners a clear and usable explanation of a common operating picture, distinguishes it from dashboards and data dumps, and carries enough operational depth to pass without revision.
strengths: The article clearly explains that a COP is a shared operational view rather than just a dashboard or video wall.
It gives practical value by showing how incident, sensor, and workflow information become more useful when viewed together.
The common-mistakes section helps beginners avoid equating integration volume with real situational awareness.
summary_assessment: This is a strong Foundation article: it is readable, operationally grounded, and useful enough to pass without revision.
